WITH WinRecords AS (
    SELECT c.TeamID, c.CoachName
    FROM Match m
    INNER JOIN Coach c ON m.HomeTeamID = c.TeamID
    WHERE m.HomeTeamResult = 'Win'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT c.TeamID, c.CoachName
    FROM Match m
    INNER JOIN Coach c ON m.AwayTeamID = c.TeamID
    WHERE m.HomeTeamResult = 'Loss'
),
CoachStats AS (
    SELECT TeamID, CoachName, COUNT(*) as TotalWins
    FROM WinRecords
    GROUP BY TeamID, CoachName
),
RankedStats AS (
    SELECT TeamID, CoachName, TotalWins,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TeamID ORDER BY TotalWins DESC) as Rank
    FROM CoachStats
)
SELECT TeamID, CoachName, TotalWins
FROM RankedStats
WHERE Rank = 1;

SELECT station
FROM (
    SELECT r.station, SUM(f.revenue) AS total_revenue
    FROM routes r
    JOIN fares f ON r.station = f.station
    WHERE r.line = 'Red'
    GROUP BY r.station
) AS station_totals
WHERE total_revenue = (
    SELECT MIN(total_revenue)
    FROM (
        SELECT r.station, SUM(f.revenue) AS total_revenue
        FROM routes r
        JOIN fares f ON r.station = f.station
        WHERE r.line = 'Red'
        GROUP BY r.station

);

SELECT Country, Year, TotalWeight FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.Country, 
        e.Year, 
        SUM(e.ArtifactWeight) AS TotalWeight,
        MAX(r.CountryRank) AS CountryRank
    FROM ExcavationSites e
    JOIN (
        SELECT Country, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(ArtifactWeight) DESC) AS CountryRank
        FROM ExcavationSites

) sub WHERE CountryRank <= 2;

WITH age_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN age BETWEEN 0 AND 19 THEN '0-19'
            WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20-29'
            WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30-39'
            WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40-49'
            ELSE '50+'
        END AS age_range
    FROM hiv_patients
    WHERE location = 'South Africa'
)
SELECT age_range, COUNT(*) AS patient_count
FROM age_ranges
GROUP BY age_range
ORDER BY patient_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH monthly_type_counts AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', date) AS complaint_month,
        complaint_type,
        COUNT(*) AS type_count
    FROM complaints
    WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 months'
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', date), complaint_type
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
),
monthly_totals AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', date) AS complaint_month,
        COUNT(*) AS total_complaints
    FROM complaints
    WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 months'
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', date)
),
max_counts AS (
    SELECT
        complaint_month,
        MAX(type_count) AS max_count
    FROM monthly_type_counts
    GROUP BY complaint_month
)
SELECT
    mtc.complaint_month,
    mtc.complaint_type,
    mtc.type_count AS most_common_count,
    mt.total_complaints
FROM monthly_type_counts mtc
JOIN max_counts mc ON mtc.complaint_month = mc.complaint_month AND mtc.type_count = mc.max_count
JOIN monthly_totals mt ON mtc.complaint_month = mt.complaint_month
ORDER BY mtc.complaint_month DESC;

WITH filtered_scores AS (
    SELECT
        customer_id,
        score_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY score_date) AS rn
    FROM customer_scores
    WHERE financial_wellbeing_score < 60
),
grouped_scores AS (
    SELECT
        customer_id,
        score_date,
        score_date - (rn * INTERVAL '1 day') AS grp
    FROM filtered_scores
),
streak_counts AS (
    SELECT
        customer_id,
        grp,
        COUNT(*) AS consecutive_days
    FROM grouped_scores
    GROUP BY customer_id, grp
),
max_streaks AS (
    SELECT
        customer_id,
        MAX(consecutive_days) AS max_consecutive_days
    FROM streak_counts
    GROUP BY customer_id
),
all_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM customer_scores
)
SELECT
    ac.customer_id,
    COALESCE(ms.max_consecutive_days, 0) AS max_consecutive_days
FROM all_customers ac
LEFT JOIN max_streaks ms ON ac.customer_id = ms.customer_id
ORDER BY ac.customer_id;

) AS T1
WHERE T1.TotalWeight = (
    SELECT MAX(T2.TotalWeight)
    FROM (
        SELECT SiteName, Country, SUM(ArtifactWeight) AS TotalWeight

    WHERE T2.Country = T1.Country
